title: The Long Run: A Parkrun Record of Progress, Patience and a Mid-2021 Breakthrough
summary: A personal Parkrun analysis centred on the standout mid-2021 run of improving performances, placed in the context of the full results distribution.
key_takeaway: The mid-2021 breakthrough stands out not as one lucky fast run, but as a concentrated sequence of improving performances within a much longer and more variable record.

inline_figures.caption: The long-term record reveals a distinct mid-2021 sequence of faster and faster runs, culminating in the series' fastest cluster.
Age grade provides a second performance lens and reinforces the strength of the mid-2021 period.
